title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH - 211info
text: LA CLINICA BIRCH GROVE HEALTH CENTER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers general counseling services including mental health evaluation and individual counseling. Also offers referrals for drug and alcohol treatment. 910 S Central Avenue Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 618-1380 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 618-1380 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurances. Sliding scale fees based on income and family size available for patients with no health insurance. No one is turned away because of inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm, Friday 8am-5pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - GENERAL MEDICAL CARE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
